title: Pilot Selector UI Finalization Record
corrections: Native location selects are preserved in DOM for validator/data compatibility but hidden from the visible pilot UI.
Four pilot location buttons are promoted as the visible selector for Star Reflection and Panchang.
Selected-location summaries are added for Star Reflection and Panchang.
Searchable location picker is recorded as the future scale-up path.

searchable_location_picker_forward_contr.interaction_pattern: User types a place name; the picker filters approved database records and shows matching location options as the query is entered.
searchable_location_picker_forward_contr.selection_rule: Only reviewed or pilot-approved records may be selectable for Panchang or Star Reflection computation.
searchable_location_picker_forward_contr.fallback_rule: Coordinate-first input remains available when named location search does not find a user location.
